---
description: 'System table containing logging entries with information about `BACKUP`
  and `RESTORE` operations.'
keywords: ['system table', 'backups']
slug: /operations/system-tables/backups
title: 'system.backups'
doc_type: 'reference'
---

## Description {#description}

Contains a list of all `BACKUP` or `RESTORE` operations with their current states and other properties. Note, that table is not persistent and it shows only operations executed after the last server restart.

## Columns {#columns}

<!--AUTOGENERATED_START-->
- `id` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Operation ID, can be either passed via SETTINGS id=... or be randomly generated UUID.
- `name` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Operation name, a string like `Disk('backups', 'my_backup')`
- `base_backup_name` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Base Backup Operation name, a string like `Disk('backups', 'my_base_backup')`
- `query_id` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Query ID of a query that started backup.
- `status` ([Enum8('CREATING_BACKUP' = 0, 'BACKUP_CREATED' = 1, 'BACKUP_FAILED' = 2, 'RESTORING' = 3, 'RESTORED' = 4, 'RESTORE_FAILED' = 5, 'BACKUP_CANCELLED' = 6, 'RESTORE_CANCELLED' = 7)](/sql-reference/data-types/enum)) — Status of backup or restore operation.
- `error` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — The error message if any.
- `start_time` ([DateTime64(6)](/sql-reference/data-types/datetime64)) — The time when operation started.
- `end_time` ([DateTime64(6)](/sql-reference/data-types/datetime64)) — The time when operation finished.
- `num_files` ([UInt64](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) — The number of files stored in the backup.
- `total_size` ([UInt64](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) — The total size of files stored in the backup.
- `num_entries` ([UInt64](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) — The number of entries in the backup, i.e. the number of files inside the folder if the backup is stored as a folder.
- `uncompressed_size` ([UInt64](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) — The uncompressed size of the backup.
- `compressed_size` ([UInt64](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) — The compressed size of the backup.
- `files_read` ([UInt64](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) — Returns the number of files read during RESTORE from this backup.
- `bytes_read` ([UInt64](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) — Returns the total size of files read during RESTORE from this backup.
- `ProfileEvents` ([Map(LowCardinality(String), UInt64)](/sql-reference/data-types/map)) — All the profile events captured during this operation.
<!--AUTOGENERATED_END-->
